prompt: Create a square 1:1 ultra-detailed origami paper-craft portrait of a stylish young Korean pop idol shown from the chest up in a three-quarter profile facing right, with the facial area deliberately covered by a smooth centered square censor block in a warm taupe-brown gradient. The subject has layered tousled black hair made from sharp folded paper facets, a visible left ear with two dangling silver earrings, and a dramatic angular metallic gold hooded jacket over a black inner shirt, all constructed from folded triangular paper panels with crisp creases, shadows, and realistic handmade texture. The background is an ornate Japanese-inspired origami collage with black and charcoal mountains, cream paper planes, gold foil accents, and exactly 3 large fan or sunburst shapes: one gold semicircle at upper left, one cream folded fan at left center, and one cream folded fan at right center. Include exactly 12 visible origami flowers: 2 large white flowers with gold stamens at the upper left and upper right, 1 small pale pink flower on the left edge, 2 pink flowers near the lower-left edge, 5 pink cherry blossoms on the lower-right branch, and 2 white cherry blossoms on the lower-right branch. Use a premium editorial fashion-poster composition, shallow paper-relief depth, warm studio lighting, high contrast between matte black paper and metallic gold paper, intricate crease lines, handcrafted shadows, and no readable text or watermark. Keep the face censor square clean and flat while the rest of the image remains highly detailed.
